description: Sac Reassembling Skeleton to Phyrexian Altar for B, it returns for B, repeat. Blood Artist drains each loop.
Triskelion deals 1 to itself (dies, Undying returns it with +1/+1). Remove the counter to reset. Loop for infinite damage.
Finks dies, Persist returns it. Sac to Altar for mana. Blood Artist drains each loop.
Saheeli -2 copies Felidar Guardian. The copy blinks Saheeli. Repeat for infinite hasty tokens.
Palinchron untaps 7 lands when it ETBs. Soulbond with Deadeye to blink it repeatedly for infinite mana.
Tap Monolith for 3 colorless, activate untap (2 colorless), copy with Rings paying 2, untap for free. Net +1 mana per loop.
Imprint Dramatic Reversal on Scepter. With 3+ mana from rocks, untap all nonlands (including the rocks) each activation.
Enchant Exarch with Twin. Tap to copy it. The copy untaps Exarch. Repeat for infinite hasty tokens.
Enchant Pestermite with Twin. Tap to copy it. The copy untaps Pestermite. Repeat for infinite hasty tokens.
Sac Spore Frog each turn to counter all combat damage. Meren returns it at end step.
Animate Dead returns Sun Titan. Titan's ETB returns Animate Dead. Attach to another creature. Loop with a sac outlet.
Finks enters with no -1/-1 counters (Melira prevents it). Sac to Viscera Seer, Persist returns it. Scry and drain each loop.
Give Ballista lifelink via Heliod. Each damage trigger gains life, Heliod puts a counter on Ballista. Infinite damage and life.
Cast Consultation naming a card not in deck, exile entire library. Thassa's Oracle ETB wins with empty library.
With no duplicate basics, Tainted Pact can exile the entire library. Thassa's Oracle wins.
Copy Restoration Angel with Kiki. The copy blinks Kiki. Repeat for infinite hasty tokens.
Closet blinks Witness at EOT, Panharmonicon doubles the ETB, getting two cards from graveyard per turn.
Tokens entering trigger Purphoros damage and Cathars' Crusade counters. Scales with any token producer.
